title: Verify true live Polymarket mark ingress for realtime market stream Stage 1
objective: Prove whether true live Polymarket market marks are entering runtime state and reaching SSE for tracked open positions.
acceptance_criteria: true live Polymarket marks proven in runtime
SSE shows stream-backed mark_source for at least one tracked open position
current_price no longer null solely due to zero subscription
rollback: Verification only unless a hard failure is proven.
